name: Adveco Group, Inc.
summary: Adveco Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, grows and sells various agricultural products in the People's Republic of China. It grows various types of fruits, such as grapes, strawberries, sand pears, kiwi, peach, mulberries, alfalfa, citrus, and bayberries; and vegetables comprising tomatoes, cucumbers, small pumpkins, eggplants, cabbage, spinach, leeks, peppers, bitter gourd, and loofah. The company also operates a rice plantation with an area of approximately 3,335,000 square meters in Mahe and Guishan; and provides organic and processed food products, as well as distributes local food products. In addition, it offers pork products, including pork loins, pork ribs, pork tails, and many others under the Running Piglet brand name; and operates a country themed restaurant that provides home-cooked Chinese meals. The company primarily sells its products through the Internet and mobile devices. Adveco Group, Inc. is headquartered in Jingmen, the People's Republic of China.
